critfall.flavor.sword.crit.0: A perfect thrust finds the gap in its guard!
critfall.flavor.sword.fumble.1: The swing goes wide and wild.
critfall.flavor.axe.fumble.0: The heavy head drags your swing down.
critfall.flavor.axe.fumble.1: The blade buries itself in the dirt.
critfall.flavor.ranged.fumble.0: The string slips — the shot sails past.
critfall.flavor.trident_melee.crit.1: A vicious thrust slips past its guard!
critfall.flavor.trident_melee.fumble.0: The prongs catch nothing but air.
critfall.flavor.trident_melee.fumble.1: The trident's weight drags the stab wide.
critfall.flavor.mace.crit.0: The mace lands with bone-cracking force!
critfall.flavor.mace.fumble.0: The weight carries you off balance.
critfall.flavor.mace.fumble.1: The heavy head swings you around.
critfall.flavor.default.fumble.0: The swing overreaches, fist meeting only air.
critfall.flavor.default.kill.1: Finished with one final, bare-fisted blow.
critfall.flavor.pickaxe.crit.1: A miner's precise strike finds the gap!
critfall.flavor.pickaxe.fumble.0: The pick's weight wrenches the swing wide.
critfall.flavor.pickaxe.fumble.1: The point skips off and buries itself in the dirt.
critfall.flavor.pickaxe.kill.1: Struck down with a single miner's blow.
critfall.flavor.shovel.crit.0: The flat of the blade cracks home!
critfall.flavor.shovel.fumble.0: The shovel twists in your grip, missing wide.
critfall.flavor.shovel.fumble.1: The blade thuds uselessly into the ground.
critfall.flavor.shovel.kill.0: Beaten down with a gravedigger's swing.
critfall.flavor.hoe.crit.0: The blade catches it at just the right angle!
critfall.flavor.hoe.fumble.0: The thin blade glances off without purchase.
critfall.flavor.hoe.fumble.1: The swing overreaches and misses clean.
critfall.flavor.hoe.kill.0: Cut down, farmer's tool still red.
critfall.flavor.shears.crit.0: The twin blades snap shut on the mark!
critfall.flavor.shears.fumble.0: The blades clack shut on empty air.
critfall.flavor.shears.fumble.1: The shears tangle, throwing the strike wide.
critfall.flavor.shears.kill.1: An undignified end, shears and all.
critfall.flavor.fishing_rod.crit.0: The hook catches and rips deep!
critfall.flavor.fishing_rod.crit.1: A vicious yank finds its mark!
critfall.flavor.fishing_rod.fumble.0: The line snaps taut on nothing.
critfall.flavor.fishing_rod.fumble.1: The lure snags and the cast goes wide.
